verses.text: Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Jerusalem khuapi, leh mite in biakna a piakna uh mun tuamtuamte mawhsakna thu gen in
Israel gammite tungah Topa ahi keima thugen, hih bangin gen in: ‘Note ka hong langpan' hi. Ka namsau dokin note a sia a pha a kibangin kong thatmang khin ding hi
Tua bangin kong thahna dingin leitaw lam pan leilu lam dongin mi khempeuh tungah ka namsau ka zang ding hi
Topa ahi keimah in namsau ka dawh khitna leh a paai-ah ka siatkik lohna ding thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in
“Tua ahih ciangin mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a lungkham mahmah bangin khuisa in la, mi khempeuh' muh dingin thumin tau in

Tua bangin na omna thu mite in hong dot ciangin mailama thupiang ding hangin a tuaci om na hihna thu gen in. Tua hun ciangin a lungsim uh launa tawh kidimin, launa hangin a khut uh lingcipin, a han'na lungsim uh bei-in, lau-in a khuk uh a lin' kelkelna ding thu leh, tua hun ding pen tu-in a hong tungta ahihna thu gen in,” Topa Pasian in a hong ci hi
Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mailam thu ding genkhol in la, Topa in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Namsau khat kitat hiam a, hoihtakin kipuah kilkel hi
Mi thahna dingin kitat hiam sitset a, khuaphia bangin a te zialzial dingin a kipuah hi. Note in thuhilhna ngai nuamlo na hih manun, kuamah in tua namsau kho theilo hi
Tua namsau limtakin kipuah a, zat pah lian dingin kikoih hi. Mi that dingpa' zat dingin kitat hiamin kipuahsiang hi

Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, awng in la kiko in. Hih namsau pen ka mihingte leh Israel makai khempeuh a kisawmna ahi hi. Amaute pen ka mite khempeuh tawh a kithat khawm ding ahi hi. Dahna tawh na dip hum in
Note hong kize-et ahi hi. Note in thuhilhna nial lailai le uh cin, hih thu khempeuh piangloin om ding ahi hiam, Topa Pasian in ci hi
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in mailam thu ding genkhol in. Na khut beng in. Namsau in satsat ding hi. Tua namsau pen mi a that namsau, mi a lausak namsau, mi a lomlomin a that namsau ahi hi
Tua namsau in ka mite meidawi sakin puksak hi. Khuaphia bangin a te zalzal, mi that dingin a kithawi ka namsau tawh a khuapi uh ka ngim hi
A hiam namsau aw, na ziat na vei vatgawp in! Na ngatna san peuhpeuh vatgawp in
Kei zong ka khut ka beng ding a, tua ciangin ka hehna dam ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi.
Topa in kei tungah thu hong genkik a

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Babylon kumpipa a namsau tawh hong kuan theihna ding lampi nih ciamtehna bawl in. Tua lampi nihte pen gam khat panin a kipan khawm ding ahi hi. Tua lampi a katna munah ciamtehna khat phut in
Tua lamka khat in Ammon mite' khuapi Rabbah-ah kumpipa a tun' theihna dingin lak ding a, a khat pen in Judah gamsunga om Jerusalem khuapi sung teek a tun'na dingin lak ding hi

Lamka a tun' ciangin Babylon kumpipa khawl phot ding hi. A tot ding lampi a theihna dingin ai nam tuamtuam san ding a, a thaltangte sing seuhseuhin, innsung pasian milimte thu dongin, biakna-in a gawh ganhingte' sin a vel ding hi

Jerusalem-ah a pai ding ai a phatna a lak a thaltangte a taklam khutah a tawi hi. Tua ai in Jerusalem-ah a paina ding, galnan'na ding phung a cian'na ding, galsimna dingin a kikona ding, kulhpite satkhapna ding molhtumte a bawlna ding, kidalna ding phung bawlin dumte a tawhna ding a gen hi

Jerusalem khuamite in khatlekhat a kihuhna ding uh midangte tawh thukimna nei khin uh ahih manin hih bangin amau' khuapi a kisawmna thu umlo uh hi. Ahi zongin hih bangin ai a kisanna pen amau' mawhna a phawktheihna ding uh leh amaute a kiman ding ahihlam a theihna ding uh lim khat ahi hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu pen: Na mawhnateng uh tu-in hong kipholak hi. Na mawhna uh mi khempeuh in thei hi. Na gamtatna panun na mawhna uh kilang hi. Mawhsakna a thuak ding na hita uh a, na galte uh khutsungah a hong pia ding ka hi hi
“A gilo, a siangtholo, Israel gam uk migilopa aw, nang' hun zong hong tungta a, gim na tuah ding ni hita hi
Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na kumpi lukhu leh na dialkhip lakhia in. Nidang bang nawnlo ding hi. Mineute hong lian ding a, miliante hong neuta ding hi
Siacip! Siacip! Hih khuapi ka siacimitsak ding a, a mel a mang zong kimu nawnlo ding hi. A uk dingin a kilawm mipa hong om ciang bekin ama khutsungah ka pia ding hi.

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mailam thu gen in la, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in Israel mite a simmawhbawl Ammon mite tawh kisai-in ka thugen, hih bangin amaute kiangah gen in: A vatlum dingin namsau khat a baihsa-in om a, mi thahna dingin kinawtngil a, khuaphia bangin a te zialzial dingin a kibawl hi
No Ammon mite aw, a siangtholo, migilote, gim a tuahna ding uh a hun tungta ahih manin sumaigawp un, ci-in a hong hanthawn, na maangmuhnate uh zuaupi hi a, na ai phate uh a mawkna ahi hi
“A do dingin kithawi vet kei un la na namsau uh a paai-ah siatkik zaw un. Note na pian'na gam, na suahna mun uhah, thu a hong khen ding ka hi hi
Note tungah ka hehna kong khah ding a, mei-am kuang hong bang ding hi. Mi thah a siam, migilote' khutsungah note kong pia ding hi
Mei in note hong kangtum ding a, note' gam mahah na sisan uh luangin, kuamah in note hong phawkkha nawnlo ding hi, Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi.
